achievements.title: I Choose You!
achievements.description: Defeat your rival in Professor Oak's Lab.
achievements.author: gooby

achievements.title: Champ In The Making!
achievements.description: Win the optional battle against your rival on Route 22.
achievements.author: gooby

achievements.title: The Rock-Solid Trainer!
achievements.description: Defeat Brock and earn the Boulder Badge.
achievements.author: gooby

achievements.title: A Rocky Battle
achievements.description: Defeat Brock in Set Mode using 2 or fewer Pokémon at level 14 or less.
achievements.author: Delmaru

achievements.title: Always Plodding Behind
achievements.description: Defeat your rival in Cerulean City.
achievements.author: gooby

achievements.title: The Tomboyish Mermaid!
achievements.description: Defeat Misty and earn the Cascade Badge.
achievements.author: gooby

achievements.title: Stealing the Star
achievements.description: Defeat Misty in Set Mode using 2 or fewer Pokémon at level 21 or less.
achievements.author: Delmaru

achievements.title: Smell Ya Later!
achievements.description: Defeat your rival on the S.S. Anne.
achievements.author: gooby

achievements.title: The Lightning American!
achievements.description: Defeat Lt. Surge and earn the Thunder Badge.
achievements.author: gooby

achievements.title: Dodging Thunderbolts
achievements.description: Defeat Lt. Surge in Set Mode using 3 or fewer Pokémon at level 24 or less.
achievements.author: Delmaru

achievements.title: Make Them Faint!
achievements.description: Defeat your rival in the Pokémon Tower.
achievements.author: gooby

achievements.title: The Nature-Loving Princess!
achievements.description: Defeat Erika and earn the Rainbow Badge.
achievements.author: gooby

achievements.title: Plants are no Problem
achievements.description: Defeat Erika in Set Mode using 3 or fewer Pokémon at level 29 or less.
achievements.author: Delmaru

achievements.title: Rigged Slots
achievements.description: Stop Team Rocket in Celadon City.
achievements.author: gooby

achievements.title: The Poisonous Ninja Master!
achievements.description: Defeat Koga and earn the Soul Badge.
achievements.author: gooby

achievements.title: Don't Get Poisoned
achievements.description: Defeat Koga in Set Mode using 4 or fewer Pokémon at level 43 or less.
achievements.author: Delmaru

achievements.title: Don't Sweat It!
achievements.description: Defeat your rival in Saffron City.
achievements.author: gooby

achievements.title: One Ball to Catch 'em All
achievements.description: Stop Team Rocket in Saffron City.
achievements.author: gooby

achievements.title: The Mistress of Psychic Pokemon!
achievements.description: Defeat Sabrina and earn the Marsh Badge.
achievements.author: gooby

achievements.title: Her Psychic Powers Are Not Strong Enough
achievements.description: Defeat Sabrina in Set Mode using 4 or fewer Pokémon at level 43 or less.
achievements.author: Delmaru

achievements.title: The Hotheaded Quiz Master!
achievements.description: Defeat Blaine and earn the Volcano Badge.
achievements.author: gooby

achievements.title: When You're Hot, You're Hot
achievements.description: Defeat Blaine in Set Mode using 4 or fewer Pokémon at level 47 or less.
achievements.author: Delmaru

achievements.title: No Tears, Only Dreams
achievements.description: Rescue Lostelle on Three Island.
achievements.author: gooby

achievements.title: The Self-Proclaimed Strongest Trainer!
achievements.description: Defeat Giovanni and earn the Earth Badge.
achievements.author: gooby

achievements.title: Well Grounded
achievements.description: Defeat Giovanni in Set Mode using 5 or fewer Pokémon at level 50 or less.
achievements.author: Delmaru

achievements.title: A Warm-Up!
achievements.description: Defeat your rival on your way to the Pokémon League.
achievements.author: gooby

achievements.title: The Real Champ I
achievements.description: Become the League Champion.
achievements.author: gooby

achievements.title: Solo Mastery
achievements.description: Defeat the first round of the Elite Four with only one Pokémon in your party.
achievements.author: Delmaru

achievements.title: Helping Hand
achievements.description: Help Lorelei in stopping Team Rocket on Island 4.
achievements.author: gooby

achievements.title: Resort Gorgeous
achievements.description: Rescue Selphy on Island 5.
achievements.author: gooby

achievements.title: Blasting Off Again
achievements.description: Stop Team Rocket in their warehouse on Island 5.
achievements.author: gooby

achievements.title: The Real Champ II
achievements.description: Return stronger and become the League Champion again.
achievements.author: gooby

achievements.title: The True Solo Master
achievements.description: Defeat the second round of the Elite Four with only one Pokémon in your party.
achievements.author: Delmaru

achievements.title: Psyched!
achievements.description: Catch Mewtwo.
achievements.author: gooby

achievements.title: One at a Time
achievements.description: Complete the Single Battle challenge at the Trainer Tower.
achievements.author: gooby

achievements.title: Seeing Double
achievements.description: Complete the Double Battle challenge at the Trainer Tower.
achievements.author: gooby

achievements.title: Half the Pokémon, Thrice the Battles
achievements.description: Complete the Knockout Battle challenge at the Trainer Tower.
achievements.author: gooby

achievements.title: Mix It All Up
achievements.description: Complete the Mixed Battle challenge at the Trainer Tower.
achievements.author: gooby

achievements.title: Lucky Egg
achievements.description: Catch a Chansey.
achievements.author: gooby

achievements.title: Frozen Solid
achievements.description: Catch Articuno.
achievements.author: gooby

achievements.title: Zapped
achievements.description: Catch Zapdos.
achievements.author: gooby

achievements.title: Molten
achievements.description: Catch Moltres.
achievements.author: gooby

achievements.title: The Legendary Beasts
achievements.description: Catch Raikou, Entei or Suicune.
achievements.author: gooby

achievements.title: Fishy Scam
achievements.description: Buy the Magikarp from the man just outside Mt. Moon's Pokemon Center.
achievements.author: Delmaru

achievements.title: Lord or Retainer
achievements.description: Pick either the Helix Fossil or the Dome Fossil inside Mt. Moon.
achievements.author: Delmaru

achievements.title: The Far-Fetched Trade
achievements.description: Trade a Spearow for a Farfetch'd in Vermillion City.
achievements.author: Delmaru

achievements.title: Baby Prince for a Baby Princess
achievements.description: Trade a male Nidoran for a female Nidoran on Route 5.
achievements.author: Delmaru

achievements.title: The Odd Mime
achievements.description: Trade an Abra for a Mr. Mime on Route 2.
achievements.author: Delmaru

achievements.title: An Extinct Flying Type
achievements.description: Obtain the Old Amber at the Pewter City Museum.
achievements.author: Delmaru

achievements.title: Take Your Pick
achievements.description: Find the Eevee in Celadon City.
achievements.author: Delmaru

achievements.title: Sleeping Roadblock
achievements.description: Catch a Snorlax on Route 12 or 16.
achievements.author: Delmaru

achievements.title: Young King for a Young Queen
achievements.description: Trade a Nidorino for a Nidorina on Route 11.
achievements.author: Delmaru

achievements.title: Karate Master
achievements.description: Defeat the Head of the Dojo in Saffron City.
achievements.author: Delmaru

achievements.title: The Transporter
achievements.description: Obtain the Lapras in Silph Co. after defeating your rival.
achievements.author: Delmaru

achievements.title: Long Lick of the Tongue
achievements.description: Trade a Golduck for a Lickitung in the gate between Route 18 and Fuschia City.
achievements.author: Delmaru

achievements.title: Tangled Mess
achievements.description: Trade a Venonat for a Tangela on Cinnabar Island.
achievements.author: Delmaru

achievements.title: The Spherical Electric Type
achievements.description: Trade a Raichu for an Electrode on Cinnabar Island.
achievements.author: Delmaru

achievements.title: New and Eggciting Things
achievements.description: Obtain the Egg from the old man in the Water Labyrinth.
achievements.author: Delmaru

achievements.title: Just Trying to Seel the Deal
achievements.description: Trade a Ponyta for a Seel on Cinnabar Island.
achievements.author: Delmaru

achievements.title: Trying Not to Jynx Myself
achievements.description: Trade a Poliwhirl for a Jynx in Cerulean City.
achievements.author: Delmaru

achievements.title: Gotta Catch 'em All: FireRed!
achievements.description: Catch all 170 obtainable Pokémon.
achievements.author: gooby
